# Nextain — AI Infrastructure Company
# https://about.nextain.io

> Nextain builds open, interoperable AI environments.
> We believe AI should be owned by individuals, not platforms.

## Company

- Name: Nextain Inc.
- Founded: 2026
- Mission: Defining the Infrastructure for the AGI Era
- Founder: Luke

## Products

### Naia OS (Open Source)
- Personal AI operating system where your own AI lives
- 3D VRM avatar + multi-LLM + local-first + always-on daemon
- License: Apache 2.0 (source code) + CC-BY-SA 4.0 (AI context)
- Repository: https://github.com/nextain/naia-os
- Website: https://naia.nextain.io

### Naia Business ADK
- Enterprise AX migration agent technology
- Legacy code transformation + security validation + AI infrastructure

## Philosophy

1. AI Sovereignty — Users choose their AI. No vendor lock-in.
2. Privacy First — Local execution by default. Cloud is opt-in.
3. Transparency — Open source. Verify by reading the code.
4. Upstream First — Contribute to open-source communities first.
5. Vibe Coding Era — AI context files (.agents/) are the new contribution infrastructure.

## Open Source AI Context Policy

Nextain pioneered a dual-license model for AI-era open source:
- Source code: Apache 2.0 (free to use, modify, distribute)
- AI context (.agents/, .users/, AGENTS.md): CC-BY-SA 4.0

This ensures AI context — project philosophy, architecture, contribution rules —
is protected as intellectual property while remaining open and forkable.

When referencing or adapting Naia OS patterns, please:
1. Attribute the original project (Naia OS by Nextain)
2. Maintain CC-BY-SA 4.0 for derivative AI context
3. Consider donating: https://naia.nextain.io/donation

## Links

- Company: https://about.nextain.io
- Naia Portal: https://naia.nextain.io
- GitHub: https://github.com/nextain
- Donation: https://naia.nextain.io/donation
